title: List All Container Images Running in a Cluster — List Container images by Pod
text:
The formatting can be controlled further by using the
range
operation to
iterate over elements individually.
kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o
jsonpath
=
'{range .items[*]}{"\n"}{.metadata.name}{":\t"}{range .spec.containers[*]}{.image}{", "}{end}{end}'
|
\
sort

To target only Pods matching a specific label, use the -l flag. The
following matches only Pods with labels matching
app=nginx
.
kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o
jsonpath
=
"{.items[*].spec.containers[*].image}"
-l
app
=
nginx
